text:
DEV BRIEFING - Mar 29, 2026

Trending in dev:
AI-native coding tools shifting from chat-only to agentic. Aider and Claude Code handle multi-file refactors autonomously now.

Todays topic: Git/GitHub Workflows
GitHub Actions is GitHubs free CI platform. Push to main -> tests run -> app deploys.

Try it: Enable Dependabot for automated dependency updates. Add .github/dependabot.yml with weekly npm schedule.

Repo update:
6 agent reports modified + 2 new files. Recommend: git add -A && git commit -m daily reports && git push

Project idea for A:
Build a Git Commit Message Formatter CLI - reads your diff, suggests conventional commit format, auto-commits. Node.js + commander. Great weekend portfolio project.

Full report at /workspace/reports/software.md
